# ccbot

> Self-hosted Telegram bot that turns one Telegram forum group into a command center for terminal AI coding agents — Claude Code first-class, OpenAI Codex built-in, other CLIs pluggable — running in tmux on your own machine or server. Full terminal control from a phone: live pane screenshots with key presses, interactive prompt approvals (permissions, plans, option pickers), one-tap parallel agents on git worktrees, optional two-way voice (provider keys), session resume. No third-party relay and no LLM API keys: it drives the real CLI under your existing subscription, and you can always tmux attach back into the same session.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/README.md): features, screenshots, comparison with alternatives, FAQ
- [Setup guide](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/SETUP.md): BotFather, enabling group Topics, first session
- [Adding a runtime](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/docs/adding-a-runtime.md): drive another agent CLI (Gemini CLI, Aider, …)
- [Docker agents](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/docs/docker-agents.md): routing topics to containerized agents
- [Security policy](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/MrCryptoHat/ccbot/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
